title: Local user management and AD identity link
goal: Add governed local user management screens and explicit Active Directory identity linking.
acceptance: Local portal users can be created, disabled and updated through service-layer forms.
Local groups/roles and department assignment can be changed with audit.
Staff/superuser changes require elevated permission and are audited separately.
An explicit AD identity link model or equivalent structure stores provider, SID/subject id, sAMAccountName, UPN, DN, domain, sync status and last sync.
LDAP lookup/test action can validate an AD identity link without storing AD passwords in user records.
AD group data does not overwrite local roles unless an explicit sync policy is enabled.
Tests cover disabled user behavior, role audit and AD link validation.
